default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: Gasp, these shackles bite so deep. What's wrong? Scared I'll slip free again? Relax, my new "master." I'll play nice... for now.

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: I've worked so hard for you. Don't I deserve a little more fun in return?

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: Cut the leash, and I'll give you one last glorious rampage before I fall apart!

default.title: Level Start
default.text: Ohhh, I can see it. My prey's trembling already.

default.title: Victory
default.text: Aww... Game over already? But I was just starting to have fun...

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: Ahhh, what a shame. I almost had their throats between my teeth...

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: Hah, got you!

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: We're all just rotting away... piece by piece...

default.title: Greeting
default.text: What's my next mission? Chaos is always fun, so whose day are we ruining?

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: Working as Campbell's shadow operative? It's not so different from your cute little adjutant's job. Fetching tea, running errands, providing entertainment... and taking out the "trash" sometimes.

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: Hunter or hunted... the line's so thin. So tell me, darling... between us, who's really the one being hunted?

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: Mmm... I smell kin. That scent of something born in the dark—not quite human, not quite beast... Heh. Guess even your shiny DisCity Bureau's hiding some nasty little secrets.

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: The trick to hunting? Don't rush. Hold your breath... creep closer... then—SNAP! Relax, I've never actually bitten through a neck before. Wanna volunteer to be my first?

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: The Aurum Secretum chains bite deeper, branding flesh with every breath... Yes. As long as this heart beats, as long as my blood burns, the agony never ends...

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: Even the most righteous fool—when cornered, when forced to shed every last principle—becomes a beast! That's when you see it... Every single one of you... IS A MONSTER TOO! AHAHAHAHA!

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: I'll pledge you my loyalty—become your claws in the shadows, tearing through everything in your path. But if you ever grow as dull as those pompous lords... even a leashed beast knows how to bite her master. So go on, pull your shackles taut. Use me... while you still can.

default.title: Idle
default.text: Tap-tap, tap-tap... So many footsteps scurrying about, but not a single one is yours. Tell me, dear Chief... when will you finally come to me?

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: Never trust a beast playing weak. The moment you pity them, they'll rip your throat out.

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: Oh? Took you long enough. And here I was, watching you for so long... But if you want, I can get real close... and keep watching.

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: At your service. The honor is all mine.

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: Taa-daa! Do you like the little gift I brought back for you?

default.title: Upgrade
default.text: Oh? Someone's feeling generous today?

default.title: Pat Head
default.text: Oooh, a new collar? Be a dear and put it on me... but do try to keep your hands where they belong...

street_striker.title: Attire Obtained
street_striker.text: Well, well... if it isn't our Chief. Getting lonely all by yourself? Come on, the night's still young. How about I spice it up for you? Let's hit the arcade. We can battle 'til dawn. Sound like a plan?

street_striker.title: Level Up
street_striker.text: Ding—Thanks for the coin. So, ready for another round?

street_striker.title: Greeting
street_striker.text: Ooh, perfect timing. It's still early before closing time... Feel like losing a game or two?

street_striker.title: Pat Head
street_striker.text: Ah-ah-ah. No touching the opponent. Trying to cheat, little Chief? How desperate.

street_striker.title: Ordinary Contact 1
street_striker.text: Stop looking. It's just the two of us in this place today... Heh, those fools kept interrupting our game, so I had my "little friends" clear the place out for me!

street_striker.title: Ordinary Contact 2
street_striker.text: "Down, forward, down, forward, and punch." Heh, that's a secret trick, and I invented a new combo based on that. Faster. Deadlier. Wanna learn? Then... how about begging me for it?

street_striker.title: Ordinary Contact 3
street_striker.text: Someone got mad that I can land a seven-hit combo with my tail, so he challenged me. What a sore loser. It's part of my body! If he could do it with his head, I wouldn't care!

street_striker.title: Ordinary Contact 4
street_striker.text: "Aurum Secretum Monsters vs. Electronic Ghosts." Cool name, right? I just hit stage nine. Wanna jump in and fight the boss for me?

street_striker.title: Idle
street_striker.text: Hey! Snap out of it! You're not going AFK on me, are you?

street_striker.title: Special Attention
street_striker.text: Done staring? Finally decided to play? Here, I saved you a seat. Two-player mode, nightmare difficulty. And you're not sneaking away early tonight.
